meaning: n.纵梁,支甲板横梁的纵梁
examples: All being well he should be available for the Carling Cup or the game before.
Ronaldo appeared as a substitute last night in United's 1-0 Carling Cup semi-final first-leg defeat at Derby County.
He will now miss games against Leeds in the FA Cup, Ipswich in the Carling Cup and away at West Ham in the Premier League.
Cardiff beat Crystal Palace on penalty kicks and qualifies for the final of the Carling Cup.
And Carling fears the Londoner could become one of English rugby's great wasted talents.
